title: Card Navigation CSS Padding and Header Background Color Tweak
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the card header background to be a subtle light gray, so that the interface has consistent visual hierarchy.
description:
Update the card header background color and fix a dropdown alignment issue in the card-navigation area.

## CSS Changes
- `.card .card-header` background-color: `#f8f9fa`
- Fix extra margin on the right-side dropdown in card-navigation on the object detail page
acceptance_criteria: Card-navigation dropdown on object detail page has correct alignment without extra margin
ux_changes: Card headers updated to light gray (#f8f9fa) background. Fixed dropdown margin issue in card-navigation on object detail page.
implementation_notes: Developer used padding: 10px instead of padding-right: 10px for better balance, and fixed extra margin on the card-navigation dropdown.
comment_summary: Developer adjusted padding approach (full padding vs right-only) and also fixed an extra margin issue on the dropdown.
